name: Pets Empire Cat Tray Cat Litter Tray Rabbit Litter Tray Large Cat Litter Trays Cat Litter Tray Large Cat Litter Tray with Lid Hooded Cat Litter Tray Covered Litter Tray (Pink)
description: Made from durable plastic material.Light weight and reliable cat litter tray with rim. Side and back of the litter container are high enough to keep litter from scattering on the floor. It features a pet-friendly entry design, making it easy for pets to get inside and use. The cat toilet features large enough space, making it more comfortable to use.Suitable for animals such as cats and small dogs
